title: LLM Wiki README
summary: Persistent, LLM-maintained wiki scaffold with a Codex-first workflow, modular CLI, interlinked markdown vault, and static Vercel viewer.
text: LLM Wiki README Summary Persistent, LLM-maintained wiki scaffold with a Codex-first workflow, modular CLI, interlinked markdown vault, and static Vercel viewer. Key claims Persistent, LLM-maintained wiki scaffold with a Codex-first workflow, modular CLI, interlinked markdown vault, and static Vercel viewer. - GitHub: https://github.com/Marhs2/llm-wiki - Live site: https://site-mu-puce.vercel.app This repository implements the persistent wiki pattern described in Karpathy's LLM wiki gist: - ingest raw sources into a growing markdown knowledge base - maintain entity / concept / topic / answer pages - keep a catalog-style index.md and time-ordered log.md - lint and repair the wiki graph over time - publish the current wiki as a searchable static site This project prefers the local Codex CLI for analysis and wiki maintenance. Set a custom Codex binary if needed: If Codex is installed normally, no extra configuration is needed. OpenAI OAuth support is still available, but optional. Entities entities/codex (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/codex-cli (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/openai (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/cli (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/vercel (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/node-cli (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/node (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README. entities/vercel-org-id (entity) — Detected heuristically in LLM Wiki README.
